abstracts.abstract: Property Tax Administration;  Revises limitations on maximum millage rate that may be levied by certain units of government; conforms provision to changes made by act; authorizes ballot summary of specified proposed amendment or revision of State Constitution to exceed specified word limit; provides for construction of act in pari materia with laws enacted during 2026 Regular Session & 2026 Special Session E of Legislature.

action.description: Laid on Table, refer to CS/SB 4-F
